narrative:
Scott Twp. township has 321 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.8 percentage points.
